offer: For restaurant owners processing 20–50 sales transactions/month, inconsistent sales data causes payroll delays. We automate payroll and tax document generation instead of manual data entry into payroll systems.
problem: Inaccurate payroll and tax documents due to manual data entry from sales.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant owners
Indie Hackers posts on payroll solutions
DM outreach with demo video to restaurant owners
Community forums for restaurant owners sharing tools
try_it: Let users try manual data entry and sales import functionality
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant community
